mapper.select: SELECT oi.item_id, oi.order_id, oi.product_code, oi.manufacturer_code, oi.quantity, oi.unit_price, oi.total_amount, oi.create_time, p.product_name, m.manufacturer_name FROM order_item oi LEFT JOIN product p ON oi.product_code = p.product_code LEFT JOIN manufacturer m ON oi.manufacturer_code = m.manufacturer_code WHERE oi.order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO order_item (order_id, product_code, manufacturer_code, quantity, unit_price, total_amount) VALUES
(#{item.orderId}, #{item.productCode}, #{item.manufacturerCode}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.unitPrice}, #{item.totalAmount})
